TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Andrzej_Duda, title = Andrzej_Duda, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Andrzej_Duda} }

S.FORM: Andrzej Duda I 1972 a miheca saka 5 folad saka 16 a romi'ad masofoc ci Andrzej Duda, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Poland anini i ci Andrzej Duda, patirengan a romi'ad i 2015 a miheca saka 8 folad saka 6 a romi'ad. Kasofocan a loma' ŚáļÁĒüŚģ∂Śļ≠ lalamod ťÖćŚĀ∂ salikaka ŚÖĄŚľüŚßźŚ¶Ļ natayalan šļčŤĻü pitooran Śģóśēô

S.FORM: Andrzej Duda I 1972 a miheca saka 5 folad saka 16 a romi'ad masofoc ci Andrzej Duda, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Poland anini i ci Andrzej Duda, patirengan a romi'ad i 2015 a miheca saka 8 folad saka 6 a romi'ad. Kasofocan a loma' ŚáļÁĒüŚģ∂Śļ≠ lalamod ťÖćŚĀ∂ salikaka ŚÖĄŚľüŚßźŚ¶Ļ natayalan šļčŤĻü pitooran Śģóśēô
